name: youtube-research
description: Citation-ready YouTube research for AI agents with timestamp-linked transcript evidence.
long_description: Research YouTube videos without downloading entire transcripts into your agent context. Search captions, return exact timestamp links, compare evidence across videos, extract key moments, and optionally analyze comments, channels, trends, and statistics with a YouTube Data API key.

tools.name: research-video
tools.description: Find citation-ready transcript evidence with exact timestamp links; no API key required.

tools.name: research-videos
tools.description: Compare timestamp-linked evidence across two to five videos; no API key required.

tools.name: get-video-transcript
tools.description: Retrieve a full timestamped transcript in an optional caption language.

tools.name: enhanced-transcript
tools.description: Filter, search, segment, and format transcripts from up to five videos.

tools.name: get-key-moments
tools.description: Extract concise timestamp-linked moments from a video transcript.

tools.name: get-segmented-transcript
tools.description: Split a transcript into time-based sections for structured analysis.

tools.name: search-videos
tools.description: Search YouTube with advanced filters; requires a YouTube Data API key.

tools.name: get-video-comments
tools.description: Retrieve video comments and optional replies; requires a YouTube Data API key.

tools.name: get-video-stats
tools.description: Retrieve video metadata and engagement statistics; requires a YouTube Data API key.

tools.name: get-channel-stats
tools.description: Retrieve channel audience and publishing statistics; requires a YouTube Data API key.

tools.name: compare-videos
tools.description: Compare engagement statistics across videos; requires a YouTube Data API key.

tools.name: get-trending-videos
tools.description: Discover trending videos by region and category; requires a YouTube Data API key.

tools.name: get-video-categories
tools.description: List YouTube video categories for a region; requires a YouTube Data API key.

tools.name: analyze-channel-videos
tools.description: Analyze recent channel performance trends; requires a YouTube Data API key.

youtube_api_key.title: YouTube Data API key (optional)
youtube_api_key.description: Enables video search, comments, statistics, trends, categories, and channel intelligence. Transcript research works without it.
